description: A clinical data coder must code raw text terms from an EDC system (like adverse events or concomitant medications) to standardized dictionaries.

nodes.task_description: Extract all uncoded adverse event terms from the EDC system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves a list of raw terms like 'tummy ache' and 'sore head'.

nodes.task_description: Use an auto-coding tool to automatically code the terms against the MedDRA dictionary.

expected_outcome.expected: The tool automatically codes 'sore head' to the MedDRA term 'Headache'. 'Tummy ache' is not found.

nodes.task_description: Manually review the terms that could not be auto-coded.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent reviews 'tummy ache' and manually codes it to the MedDRA term 'Abdominal pain'.
